prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约15866→16363→29103（异常）→19519→14293，2025年较2024年大幅前移约5226名，回升至近年最优水平，显示报考热度明显回暖。\ n本省物理类计划2021年101人、2022年100人、2023年97人、2024年93人、2025年90人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划91人，较2025年微增1人，扩幅约 1.1%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第67名，近年排名在54–67区间波动，整体稳定；2023年声 誉评价为中性/混合，无显著负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第68位（一般），短视频曝光量一般，未出现明显报考关注信号；近年无投档断档记录；安全科学与 工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，与物理类招生专业（安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木类等）高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气类、电子信息类等热门工科专业在矿大招生位次靠前（2025年计算机类8369名、电气类7630名），社会热度持续偏热；本省2026年普通高考总人数209000 人，按近年物理类占比约65%估算物理类约135850人，较2025年物理类139478人略降，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移后上行空间收窄、2026年计划微扩（+1人）及本省物理类考生数略降，考虑学校211层次与优势学 科对考生的持续吸引力，预测2026年最低位次约14418名，区间13918–14918名。

- 电子信息工程

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间13918–14918名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（机械类、数学类、能源动力类等），一档专业（电气、计算机、电子信息）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（安全科 学与工程类、矿业类等矿大王牌学科）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<13918名）可重点冲刺一档热门工科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 15866 → 16363 → 29103 (abnormal) → 19519 → 14293. In 2025, it significantly moved forward by about 5226 places compared to 2024, returning to the best level in recent years, indicating a clear recovery in application popularity.\ nThe provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 101 in 2021, 100 in 2022, 97 in 2023, 93 in 2024, and 90 in 2025, showing a gradual annual decrease. The 2026 plan is 91, a slight increase of 1 person from 2025, an expansion of about 1.1%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 54 and 67 in recent years, overall stable. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 68th (average), with general short video exposure, showing no obvious application attention signal. No record of admission gaps in recent years. Safety Science and Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, and Civil Engineering is A-, which highly correspond to the Physics Category enrollment majors (Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, Civil Engineering, etc.), strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information have high admission rankings at CUMT (e.g., Computer Science at 8369, Electrical Engineering at 7630 in 2025), with sustained social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is 209,000, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 65%, resulting in approximately 135,850 candidates, a slight decrease from 139,478 in 2025, easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrowed upward space after the significant forward movement in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+1 person), and the slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in the province, along with the sustained appeal of the university's 211 status and advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 14,418, with a range of 13,918 to 14,918.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13,918 to 14,918, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors (Safety Science and Engineering, Mining Engineering, etc., CUMT's flagship disciplines) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<13,918), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3295 → 3541 → 3722 → 3667 → 3697, fluctuating narrowly within the 3300–3700 range over the past five years. In 2025, the ranking of 3697 is in the middle of this range, showing an overall stable trend. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 17 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 11 in 2025, with a significant reduction in 2025. The 2026 plan is 13, an increase of 2 from 2025, an expansion of about 18.2%, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years. Its reputation evaluation in 2023 is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 68th (average), showing no obvious application attention signal. There have been no records of enrollment gaps in recent years. Safety Science and Engineering is A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, and Civil Engineering is A-, which have no direct disciplinary correspondence with History Category majors (such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Network and New Media, etc.), but they support the overall level of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature is popular (recommended), and Network and New Media has average popularity, which has a certain appeal to History Category candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is 209,000. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 35%, the estimated number of History Category candidates is about 73,150, which is basically the same as the 73,373 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the long-term narrow fluctuation of History Category rankings and the approximately 18.2% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (11→13) as the main influencing factor, and taking into account that the expansion effect significantly alleviates competition, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 4150, with a range of 3650–4650.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3650), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors.
